title: Harry Leary “Harry” DIRTWERX Helmet
collection: Harry’s Room — The Harry Leary Collection
description: A black, yellow, silver and white full-face helmet marked “HARRY” and connected by the collection to Harry Leary’s DIRTWERX-era material record.
provenance_summary: Presented as part of the Harry Leary Collection; acquisition detail was not supplied in this source package.
qualifications: The helmet markings are visible in the source image.
The DIRTWERX and rider attribution are preserved from the supplied collection description.
